targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT oid) as value FROM user_trades WHERE time >= UNIX_TIMESTAMP($__timeFrom()) * 1000 AND time <= UNIX_TIMESTAMP($__timeTo()) * 1000 AND oid IS NOT NULL AND ('${exclude_currency}' = '$__all' OR coin NOT IN (${exclude_currency:singlequote}))

SELECT ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN fill_count > 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) as value FROM (SELECT oid, COUNT(*) as fill_count FROM user_trades WHERE time >= UNIX_TIMESTAMP($__timeFrom()) * 1000 AND time <= UNIX_TIMESTAMP($__timeTo()) * 1000 AND oid IS NOT NULL AND ('${exclude_currency}' = '$__all' OR coin NOT IN (${exclude_currency:singlequote})) GROUP BY oid) as order_fills

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN fill_count > 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as value FROM (SELECT oid, COUNT(*) as fill_count FROM user_trades WHERE time >= UNIX_TIMESTAMP($__timeFrom()) * 1000 AND time <= UNIX_TIMESTAMP($__timeTo()) * 1000 AND oid IS NOT NULL AND ('${exclude_currency}' = '$__all' OR coin NOT IN (${exclude_currency:singlequote})) GROUP BY oid) as order_fills

SELECT ROUND(AVG(fill_count), 2) as value FROM (SELECT oid, COUNT(*) as fill_count FROM user_trades WHERE time >= UNIX_TIMESTAMP($__timeFrom()) * 1000 AND time <= UNIX_TIMESTAMP($__timeTo()) * 1000 AND oid IS NOT NULL AND ('${exclude_currency}' = '$__all' OR coin NOT IN (${exclude_currency:singlequote})) GROUP BY oid HAVING COUNT(*) > 1) as partial_fills

SELECT ROUND(AVG(total_notional), 2) as value FROM (SELECT oid, SUM(sz * px) as total_notional FROM user_trades WHERE time >= UNIX_TIMESTAMP($__timeFrom()) * 1000 AND time <= UNIX_TIMESTAMP($__timeTo()) * 1000 AND oid IS NOT NULL AND ('${exclude_currency}' = '$__all' OR coin NOT IN (${exclude_currency:singlequote})) GROUP BY oid) as order_fills

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN fill_count = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as `1 Fill`, SUM(CASE WHEN fill_count = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as `2 Fills`, SUM(CASE WHEN fill_count >= 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as `3+ Fills` FROM (SELECT oid, COUNT(*) as fill_count FROM user_trades WHERE time >= UNIX_TIMESTAMP($__timeFrom()) * 1000 AND time <= UNIX_TIMESTAMP($__timeTo()) * 1000 AND oid IS NOT NULL AND ('${exclude_currency}' = '$__all' OR coin NOT IN (${exclude_currency:singlequote})) GROUP BY oid) as order_fills

SELECT coin as Currency, COUNT(DISTINCT oid) as Total_Orders, SUM(CASE WHEN fill_count > 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as Partial_Fills, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN fill_count > 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(DISTINCT oid) * 100, 1) as Partial_Pct, ROUND(AVG(total_notional), 2) as Avg_Notional_USD FROM (SELECT oid, coin, COUNT(*) as fill_count, SUM(sz * px) as total_notional FROM user_trades WHERE time >= UNIX_TIMESTAMP($__timeFrom()) * 1000 AND time <= UNIX_TIMESTAMP($__timeTo()) * 1000 AND oid IS NOT NULL AND ('${exclude_currency}' = '$__all' OR coin NOT IN (${exclude_currency:singlequote})) GROUP BY oid, coin) as order_fills GROUP BY coin ORDER BY Total_Orders DESC

SELECT coin as Currency, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN fill_count > 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(DISTINCT oid) * 100, 1) as `Partial Fill Rate` FROM (SELECT oid, coin, COUNT(*) as fill_count FROM user_trades WHERE time >= UNIX_TIMESTAMP($__timeFrom()) * 1000 AND time <= UNIX_TIMESTAMP($__timeTo()) * 1000 AND oid IS NOT NULL AND ('${exclude_currency}' = '$__all' OR coin NOT IN (${exclude_currency:singlequote})) GROUP BY oid, coin) as order_fills GROUP BY coin ORDER BY `Partial Fill Rate` DESC

SELECT coin as Currency, COUNT(*) as Partial_Orders, ROUND(AVG(first_fill_notional), 2) as First_Fill_USD, ROUND(AVG(total_notional), 2) as Avg_Total_USD, ROUND(AVG(leftover_notional), 2) as Leftover_USD, ROUND(AVG(leftover_notional / total_notional * 100), 1) as Leftover_Pct FROM (SELECT oid, coin, COUNT(*) as fill_count, SUM(sz * px) as total_notional, MIN(sz * px) as first_fill_notional, SUM(sz * px) - MIN(sz * px) as leftover_notional FROM user_trades WHERE time >= UNIX_TIMESTAMP($__timeFrom()) * 1000 AND time <= UNIX_TIMESTAMP($__timeTo()) * 1000 AND oid IS NOT NULL AND ('${exclude_currency}' = '$__all' OR coin NOT IN (${exclude_currency:singlequote})) GROUP BY oid, coin HAVING COUNT(*) > 1) as partial_fills GROUP BY coin ORDER BY Partial_Orders DESC

SELECT coin as Currency, ROUND(AVG(first_fill_notional), 2) as `First Fill`, ROUND(AVG(leftover_notional), 2) as `Leftover` FROM (SELECT oid, coin, SUM(sz * px) as total_notional, MIN(sz * px) as first_fill_notional, SUM(sz * px) - MIN(sz * px) as leftover_notional FROM user_trades WHERE time >= UNIX_TIMESTAMP($__timeFrom()) * 1000 AND time <= UNIX_TIMESTAMP($__timeTo()) * 1000 AND oid IS NOT NULL AND ('${exclude_currency}' = '$__all' OR coin NOT IN (${exclude_currency:singlequote})) GROUP BY oid, coin HAVING COUNT(*) > 1) as partial_fills GROUP BY coin ORDER BY AVG(leftover_notional) DESC

SELECT CASE WHEN total_notional < 20 THEN '<$20' WHEN total_notional < 30 THEN '$20-30' WHEN total_notional < 40 THEN '$30-40' WHEN total_notional < 50 THEN '$40-50' WHEN total_notional < 60 THEN '$50-60' ELSE '>$60' END as `Size Bracket`, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN fill_count > 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) * 100, 1) as `Partial Fill Rate` FROM (SELECT oid, COUNT(*) as fill_count, SUM(sz * px) as total_notional FROM user_trades WHERE time >= UNIX_TIMESTAMP($__timeFrom()) * 1000 AND time <= UNIX_TIMESTAMP($__timeTo()) * 1000 AND oid IS NOT NULL AND ('${exclude_currency}' = '$__all' OR coin NOT IN (${exclude_currency:singlequote})) GROUP BY oid) as order_fills GROUP BY CASE WHEN total_notional < 20 THEN '<$20' WHEN total_notional < 30 THEN '$20-30' WHEN total_notional < 40 THEN '$30-40' WHEN total_notional < 50 THEN '$40-50' WHEN total_notional < 60 THEN '$50-60' ELSE '>$60' END ORDER BY CASE `Size Bracket` WHEN '<$20' THEN 1 WHEN '$20-30' THEN 2 WHEN '$30-40' THEN 3 WHEN '$40-50' THEN 4 WHEN '$50-60' THEN 5 ELSE 6 END

panels.title: Partial Fill Rate by Order Size

targets.rawSql: SELECT CASE WHEN total_notional < 20 THEN '<$20' WHEN total_notional < 30 THEN '$20-30' WHEN total_notional < 40 THEN '$30-40' WHEN total_notional < 50 THEN '$40-50' WHEN total_notional < 60 THEN '$50-60' ELSE '>$60' END as `Size Bracket`, SUM(CASE WHEN fill_count = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as `Full Fills`, SUM(CASE WHEN fill_count > 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as `Partial Fills` FROM (SELECT oid, COUNT(*) as fill_count, SUM(sz * px) as total_notional FROM user_trades WHERE time >= UNIX_TIMESTAMP($__timeFrom()) * 1000 AND time <= UNIX_TIMESTAMP($__timeTo()) * 1000 AND oid IS NOT NULL AND ('${exclude_currency}' = '$__all' OR coin NOT IN (${exclude_currency:singlequote})) GROUP BY oid) as order_fills GROUP BY CASE WHEN total_notional < 20 THEN '<$20' WHEN total_notional < 30 THEN '$20-30' WHEN total_notional < 40 THEN '$30-40' WHEN total_notional < 50 THEN '$40-50' WHEN total_notional < 60 THEN '$50-60' ELSE '>$60' END ORDER BY CASE `Size Bracket` WHEN '<$20' THEN 1 WHEN '$20-30' THEN 2 WHEN '$30-40' THEN 3 WHEN '$40-50' THEN 4 WHEN '$50-60' THEN 5 ELSE 6 END

panels.title: Order Count by Size (Full vs Partial)

targets.rawSql: SELECT pair as Currency, COUNT(*) as Trades, ROUND(SUM(notional_usd), 0) as Volume, ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN pct_rank <= 0.25 THEN notional_usd ELSE 0 END), 2) as P25, ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN pct_rank <= 0.50 THEN notional_usd ELSE 0 END), 2) as P50, ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN pct_rank <= 0.75 THEN notional_usd ELSE 0 END), 2) as P75 FROM (SELECT pair, notional_usd, PERCENT_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY pair ORDER BY notional_usd) as pct_rank FROM trade_sizes WHERE timestamp >= UNIX_TIMESTAMP($__timeFrom()) * 1000 AND timestamp <= UNIX_TIMESTAMP($__timeTo()) * 1000) ranked GROUP BY pair ORDER BY Trades DESC

SELECT FROM_UNIXTIME(FLOOR(time/1000/3600)*3600) as time, coin as metric, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN fill_count > 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) as value FROM (SELECT oid, coin, MIN(time) as time, COUNT(*) as fill_count FROM user_trades WHERE time >= UNIX_TIMESTAMP($__timeFrom()) * 1000 AND time <= UNIX_TIMESTAMP($__timeTo()) * 1000 AND oid IS NOT NULL AND ('${exclude_currency}' = '$__all' OR coin NOT IN (${exclude_currency:singlequote})) GROUP BY oid, coin) as order_fills GROUP BY FLOOR(time/1000/3600), coin HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5 ORDER BY time

SELECT COUNT(*) as value FROM user_trades WHERE time >= UNIX_TIMESTAMP($__timeFrom()) * 1000 AND time <= UNIX_TIMESTAMP($__timeTo()) * 1000 AND oid IS NOT NULL AND ('${exclude_currency}' = '$__all' OR coin NOT IN (${exclude_currency:singlequote}))

SELECT COUNT(*) - COUNT(DISTINCT oid) as value FROM user_trades WHERE time >= UNIX_TIMESTAMP($__timeFrom()) * 1000 AND time <= UNIX_TIMESTAMP($__timeTo()) * 1000 AND oid IS NOT NULL AND ('${exclude_currency}' = '$__all' OR coin NOT IN (${exclude_currency:singlequote}))

SELECT ROUND(100.0 * (COUNT(*) - COUNT(DISTINCT oid)) / COUNT(DISTINCT oid), 1) as value FROM user_trades WHERE time >= UNIX_TIMESTAMP($__timeFrom()) * 1000 AND time <= UNIX_TIMESTAMP($__timeTo()) * 1000 AND oid IS NOT NULL AND ('${exclude_currency}' = '$__all' OR coin NOT IN (${exclude_currency:singlequote}))

panels.description: Estimated additional API requests due to partial fills (1 extra request per extra fill)

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND((COUNT(*) - COUNT(DISTINCT oid)) / (TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, FROM_UNIXTIME(UNIX_TIMESTAMP($__timeFrom())), FROM_UNIXTIME(UNIX_TIMESTAMP($__timeTo()))) + 1), 1) as value FROM user_trades WHERE time >= UNIX_TIMESTAMP($__timeFrom()) * 1000 AND time <= UNIX_TIMESTAMP($__timeTo()) * 1000 AND oid IS NOT NULL AND ('${exclude_currency}' = '$__all' OR coin NOT IN (${exclude_currency:singlequote}))

panels.title: Extra Fills/Hour
